goal: Given a read-side ao command invoked by an agent, when it is run with --json or with an unknown flag, then stdout carries data / stderr carries diagnostics, ao capabilities and ao robot-docs describe the surface, and an unknown flag returns a Levenshtein typo hint naming the corrected flag.
narrative: A user or evaluator exercises the system behavior for this goal: Given a read-side ao command invoked by an agent, when it is run with --json or with an unknown flag, then stdout carries data / stderr carries diagnostics, ao capabilities and ao robot-docs describe the surface, and an unknown flag returns a Levenshtein typo hint naming the corrected flag..
expected_outcome: The implementation satisfies the goal in observable behavior: Given a read-side ao command invoked by an agent, when it is run with --json or with an unknown flag, then stdout carries data / stderr carries diagnostics, ao capabilities and ao robot-docs describe the surface, and an unknown flag returns a Levenshtein typo hint naming the corrected flag..
